name: dependabot_alerts
description:
Retrieves Dependabot vulnerability alerts for a GitHub repository. Shows CVE IDs, severity, affected package, and available fix versions. Requires GitHub connector with a token that has 'security_events' or 'repo' scope.
Use when: user asks about Dependabot alerts, GitHub security tab findings, vulnerable dependencies in a remote GitHub repo.
Scope: remote GitHub API only — requires GITHUB_TOKEN. Not for local project scanning.
Not for: scanning a local project for vulnerable deps (use dependency_audit), local secret scanning (use repo_scanner), or GitHub code scanning SARIF findings (use code_scanning_alerts).

severity.description: Filter by minimum severity level. Optional — omit to return all severities.
